caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" printed in gold across the chest, and a gold watch on his left wrist sits in a studio setting. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white banner features the "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logo and gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug is visible on the desk, featuring the text "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". A small logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, looking slightly to his left and speaking. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, and his hands remain rested on the desk in front of him.
